name: multi-field-atom-brick-allocator-on
description: Wave 1 / E1 Step 7 — multi-field-three-atlas-atoms regression. Multi-Field scene with `useAtomBrickAllocator: true` (the per-atom brick path shipped in Wave 1 Steps 1-6 of the E1+E2 plan; ADR 0012 + 0014 follow-on). Flag is the soak-gate switch; default is `false` until Step 8 flips it. With the flag off the legacy per-cell `sampleFieldAtlas` is used (last-write-wins on cells touched by multiple atoms — the multi-field-three-spheres bug); with the flag on, `sampleAtomAtlas` walks the multi-slot per-cell list so each atom owns its own brick at the shared cell. This test pins the post-Step-6 baseline.
